project: runts-ink: Maximize TS/TSX Coverage in HIR + Compile Path
goal: 100% of practical TS/TSX constructs supported in HIR representation and compile-path codegen, validated by Ink examples across all 3 environments (deno, runts dev, runts build) with 100% output match

architecture_decision.rationale: HIR interpreter removed entirely. Taffy removed entirely. Yoga is the same engine Ink uses internally, giving maximum layout parity. rquickjs is battle-tested ES2020. Minimum custom code = thin JS bridge + oxc/swc transpile + Yoga layout.
architecture_decision.dev_pipeline: TSX source -> oxc_parser -> oxc_codegen/swc -> JS bundle -> rquickjs context + js_bridge.rs -> VNode tree -> Yoga -> Ratatui
architecture_decision.compile_pipeline: TSX source -> HIR -> Rust codegen -> cargo build -> native binary

phases.description: Fix build. Re-enable linter. Split remaining god files.

phases.name: Phase 1: rquickjs + Yoga Engine
phases.description: Delete HIR runtime and Taffy. Wire rquickjs as sole dev engine. TSX->JS pipeline. Complete bridge.

phases.name: Phase 2: Compile + Verification
phases.description: Fix compile path. One parity harness. Per-example tests.

phases.name: Phase 3: Coverage Gaps
phases.description: Re-enable disabled spec tests. Add missing Ink examples. Verify bridge completeness.

phases.name: Phase 4: Cleanup + Future
phases.description: Delete dead code. Update docs. Evaluate Boa.

phases.name: Phase 5: Compile Path Hardening
phases.description: Fix quote_codegen to emit compilable Rust for core HIR constructs. Add compile-path tests.

phases.name: Phase 6: Example-Driven Feature Coverage
phases.description: Create Ink examples for every missing TS/TSX/React/Ink feature. Each example validates all 3 environments via parity harness with 100% output match.

phases.name: Phase 7: HIR & Parser Expansion
phases.description: Add missing HIR variants for TS features not yet represented. Update parser and codegen.

phases.name: Phase 8: Compile-Path Integration Tests
phases.description: Expand compile_codegen.rs to 50+ tests. Add compile-path parity tests. Add negative tests.

phases.name: Phase 9: Final Audit
phases.description: Build complete coverage matrix. Verify all P0 features work end-to-end. Document remaining gaps.

phases.name: Phase 10: Extended TS/TSX Coverage
phases.description: Additional Ink examples for TS/TSX features not yet exercised. Covers logical assignment, React 18 hooks, type declarations, module patterns, collections, and advanced type system features.

phases.name: Phase 11: Type System + Runtime API Deep Coverage
phases.description: Additional Ink examples for utility types, modern runtime APIs, React patterns, and advanced type system features not yet exercised.

phases.name: Phase 12: Runtime API + Type System Completion
phases.description: Final Ink examples for runtime APIs (JSON, Function, Object, Number, Error) and remaining type system features (function overloads, static blocks, private methods) not yet exercised.

phases.name: Phase 13: Real-World Validation (../tui1 Port)
phases.description: Tasks identified by attempting to compile the ../tui1 real-world Ink chat example. Covers missing bridge globals (process, Date, timers), JSX edge cases (fragments, pragmas), and dynamic import of node built-ins.

phases.name: Phase 14: Final Runtime API + Module Pattern Completion
phases.description: Additional Ink examples for remaining runtime APIs (console, URI encoding, array reduce, string search, error subclasses) and module patterns (namespace re-export, inline type imports, parameter properties) not yet exercised.

phases.name: Phase 15: Advanced React Patterns + Deep Runtime Coverage
phases.description: Ink examples for advanced React patterns (render props, HOCs, key/refs) and remaining runtime APIs (Symbol.iterator, ArrayBuffer, performance, structuredClone, arguments, RegExp named groups, string well-formed).

phases.name: Phase 16: Operator + Syntax + Runtime API Completion
phases.description: Final Ink examples for operators (in, void, comma, ++/--), syntax features (for-await-of, spread in calls, destructuring in params/catch/for-of), and remaining runtime APIs (Object.entries/values, Array static methods, Date/RegExp/Promise comprehensive methods, parseInt/parseFloat global).

phases.name: Phase 17: ES2024 + TypeScript 5.0+ Feature Completion
phases.description: Final Ink examples for ES2024 features (using/await using, import attributes, Array.fromAsync, Promise.withResolvers, Object.groupBy) and TypeScript 5.0+ features (const type parameters, accessor fields, satisfies expressions, type annotation in catch, iterator helpers, throw expressions).

phases.name: Phase 19: Tagged Templates + Compiler Options + Reflect Deep Coverage + ES2025
phases.description: Final Ink examples for tagged template literals, Function constructor, Object prototype/static methods, Reflect deep methods, tsconfig compiler options (paths, esModuleInterop, jsxFactory, strict mode, downlevelIteration, preserveConstEnums, moduleResolution), Web APIs (URL, TextEncoder, Headers), and ES2025 features (RegExp.escape, Set methods).

phases.name: Phase 20: Advanced Language + Runtime + React Patterns + Compile Infrastructure
phases.description: Final Ink examples for advanced language features (eval, super calls, private-in, import.meta.resolve, globalThis, BigInt operations), runtime API deep coverage (Intl, Atomics), compile path infrastructure (source maps, verbatimModuleSyntax), JSX advanced patterns (member expressions, namespaces), and React patterns (startTransition, React 19 hooks).

phases.name: Phase 21: Niche Language Features + TypeScript Config + Web Streams + Crypto
phases.description: Final Ink examples for niche language features (sequence expressions, labeled break/continue, nested/default destructuring, readonly tuples, keyof typeof), TypeScript configuration (reference path, isolatedModules, resolveJsonModule), and runtime APIs (AggregateError, URLSearchParams, TextDecoder, Web Crypto, ReadableStream, CompressionStream).

phases.name: Phase 22: Web APIs + TypeScript Config Edge Cases + JSX/TS Language Patterns
phases.description: Final Ink examples for Web APIs (WebSocket, FormData, Blob, EventTarget, FinalizationRegistry, SharedArrayBuffer), TypeScript configuration edge cases (noImplicitReturns, noFallthroughCasesInSwitch, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes, preserveValueImports, jsxPreserve, emitDecoratorMetadata), and advanced TS/JSX language patterns (JSX spread children, rest destructuring, named tuples, const enum, ambient modules, ts-nocheck, server components).

phases.name: Phase 23: Emerging Runtime APIs + React Patterns + Module Resolution + Compile Infrastructure
phases.description: Final Ink examples for emerging runtime APIs (Temporal, additional Intl, SuppressedError, String.raw, AsyncGenerator, Iterator.from, DisposableStack, escape/unescape), React patterns (Profiler, StrictMode, createPortal), module resolution (package.json exports/imports, project references), and compile infrastructure (watch mode, declaration files).

phases.name: Phase 24: Orphaned Example Audit + Advanced Type System + Language Edge Cases
phases.description: Comprehensive audit of 92 orphaned existing Ink examples, plus advanced type system features (recursive types, distributive conditional types, variadic tuples, branded types), language edge cases (generator return/throw, optional catch binding, nullish in objects, object shorthand, computed class members, class field initializers), and module/type directives (type-only import assertions, AMD module, satisfies on functions).

phases.name: Phase 25: Advanced Destructuring + Node.js/Web Runtime APIs
phases.description: Final Ink examples for advanced destructuring patterns (mixed, computed keys, renaming), Node.js runtime APIs (global, Buffer, __dirname, __filename, CommonJS interop, process.nextTick, EventEmitter, path, os), and Web APIs (AbortSignal, fetch, PerformanceObserver, setImmediate, URLPattern).

phases.name: Phase 26: Node.js Standard Library + Browser Globals + Binary Data + Promise/Math Completion
phases.description: Final Ink examples for Node.js standard library modules (fs, crypto, util, stream, readline, assert, child_process, http), process properties (pid, cwd, uptime, hrtime, memoryUsage), browser globals (window, document, navigator, localStorage, sessionStorage), binary data APIs (typed arrays, DataView, File constructor), Promise chaining (then/catch/finally), and advanced Math methods/constants.

phases.name: Phase 27: React Hook Patterns + JSX Expression Patterns + Component Composition
phases.description: Final Ink examples for React hook patterns (useEffect cleanup, useCallback/useMemo dependencies, custom hook composition), React children API (Children.only, Children.toArray), component composition patterns (generic components, polymorphic components, compound components, context reducer, controlled/uncontrolled, forwardRef with generics, render props with generics, HOCs with generics), and JSX expression patterns (optional call, non-null assertion, type assertions, nullish coalescing, optional chaining, conditional rendering).

phases.name: Phase 28: Advanced Type System Patterns
phases.description: Final Ink examples for advanced TypeScript type system patterns: mapped types with as clause, template literal types with unions, user-defined type guards (is), satisfies with unions, as const in function returns, utility types Extract/Exclude/NonNullable, key remapping, recursive readonly mapped types, nested conditional types, and inline import type syntax.

phases.name: Phase 29: Array/Object/String/Number/Date/Console/Error/Symbol/Process/Stream/WebAssembly API Completion
phases.description: Final Ink examples for array methods (flat, flatMap), object methods (fromEntries), string methods (match, search, replace), RegExp well-known symbols, number formatting (toExponential, toPrecision, toFixed), date locale formatting (toLocaleDateString, toLocaleTimeString, toDateString, toTimeString), advanced console methods (assert, count, group, trace, timeLog), error stack APIs (captureStackTrace, stackTraceLimit), well-known symbols (toStringTag, toPrimitive, hasInstance, species), import.meta.env (Vite pattern), process.hrtime, fs/promises, stream/web (ReadableStream, WritableStream, TransformStream), timers/promises, and WebAssembly.

phases.name: Phase 30: Final Comprehensive Coverage Audit
phases.description: End-to-end audit of all 376 tasks, verifying file-to-JSON consistency, phase coverage, 100% parity language, orphaned example tracking, and final stats publication.

phases.name: Phase 31: React 18 Hooks
phases.description: Ink examples for React 18 hooks (useSyncExternalStore, useId, useInsertionEffect, useTransition, useDeferredValue).
